commit.subject: LU-16335 mdt: skip target check for rm_entry
commit.message:
LU-16335 mdt: skip target check for rm_entry

For "lfs rm_entry", target may not exist, sanity check of it may fail
thus causes rm_entry fail.

Add sanity 832.
